cutoverTracks.label: Current LC site snapshot and rollback
cutoverTracks.currentState: Current LC Training routes, booking, auth, blog, team, LCFC, and admin flows remain live.
cutoverTracks.cutoverAction: Capture route screenshots, smoke-test outputs, current metadata, env values, and deployment id before any promotion change.
cutoverTracks.rollbackAction: Revert the routing change to the last known LC Training deployment and keep `/detroit-dynamo` as the preview shell.
requiredEvidence: Passing current-site route smoke test
Passing current LC booking/auth/admin checks
Production deployment id or rollback target
Owner approval that a promotion window is open
cutoverTracks.blockedUntil: Do not switch the root experience until current-site preservation evidence and rollback instructions are saved.

relatedPromotionGates.requiredEvidence: Root LC routes, booking, auth, forms, navigation, manifest, and footer continue to work before launch.
relatedPromotionGates.nextAction: Keep running current-site isolation checks before every promotion decision.

cutoverTracks.label: Root route and public shell promotion
cutoverTracks.currentState: Detroit Dynamo remains isolated under `/detroit-dynamo` and root still renders the current LC Training shell.
cutoverTracks.cutoverAction: Promote the Detroit Dynamo layout to the approved public entry point only after all promotion gates pass.
cutoverTracks.rollbackAction: Restore the current LC Training root route and keep Dynamo available only under the preview route.
requiredEvidence: Owner-approved launch timing
Verified Detroit Dynamo root shell on desktop and mobile
No old LC header/footer inside Dynamo routes
No broken current LC route after rollback rehearsal
cutoverTracks.blockedUntil: Owner signs off on the full brand switch and all external promotion gates are cleared.

relatedPromotionGates.requiredEvidence: Root LC routes, booking, auth, forms, navigation, manifest, and footer continue to work before launch.
relatedPromotionGates.nextAction: Keep running current-site isolation checks before every promotion decision.

cutoverTracks.label: SEO, metadata, robots, and indexing
cutoverTracks.currentState: Dynamo preview pages intentionally use preview metadata and noindex/noindex-style launch controls.
cutoverTracks.cutoverAction: Apply approved Detroit Dynamo titles, descriptions, favicon, social image, canonical URLs, robots, and sitemap publication.
cutoverTracks.rollbackAction: Reapply preview noindex and restore current LC Training metadata at root if the launch is reversed.
requiredEvidence: Approved metadata and Open Graph assets
Approved sitemap and robots draft
Noindex removal approval
Search-console or SEO-owner launch acknowledgement
cutoverTracks.blockedUntil: Do not remove preview noindex or publish Dynamo root SEO until the owner approves launch metadata.

relatedPromotionGates.requiredEvidence: All required dd_* collections exist, permissions are reviewed, and public forms persist to Appwrite.
relatedPromotionGates.nextAction: Provision after final field review and valid credentials are available.

relatedPromotionGates.requiredEvidence: Canonical routes, sitemap, metadata, Open Graph assets, and old-route redirect timing are approved.
relatedPromotionGates.nextAction: Remove noindex only when Detroit Dynamo is the approved public brand.

cutoverTracks.label: Redirect and alias migration
cutoverTracks.currentState: Old LC routes remain real routes, and Detroit Dynamo redirect plans are draft-only launch artifacts.
cutoverTracks.cutoverAction: Apply approved redirects from old LC public paths to Dynamo equivalents without breaking auth, admin, or payment callbacks.
cutoverTracks.rollbackAction: Disable the redirect rules and restore old LC public paths as canonical routes.
requiredEvidence: Approved redirect plan
Booking/payment callback exclusions reviewed
Admin/auth route exclusions reviewed
Post-cutover 200/301 route verification
cutoverTracks.blockedUntil: Do not apply permanent redirects while the preview is still used for comparison.

cutoverTracks.label: Backend intake and admin data cutover
cutoverTracks.currentState: Dynamo public forms use local preview storage with optional Appwrite intake mode and fallback.
cutoverTracks.cutoverAction: Use live Appwrite intake after `dd_*` collections, functions, permissions, and status-action workflows are deployed and tested.
cutoverTracks.rollbackAction: Switch the admin intake mode back to local preview/fallback and stop writing Dynamo records until the backend is repaired.
requiredEvidence: Provisioned isolated `dd_*` collections
Deployed lead intake and pipeline action functions
Production-preview submissions for every lead type
Admin pipeline status updates verified with authenticated users
cutoverTracks.blockedUntil: Appwrite credentials, collections, functions, permissions, and production-preview submissions are verified.

cutoverTracks.label: Booking, payment, package, and waiver cutover
cutoverTracks.currentState: Current LC booking/payment flows remain live, and Dynamo packages/waivers remain inquiry-only or approval-gated.
cutoverTracks.cutoverAction: Connect approved Dynamo packages, payment provider products, refund rules, waivers, and signature workflows.
cutoverTracks.rollbackAction: Disable Dynamo checkout/signature entry points and route visitors back to inquiry forms or the current LC booking fallback.
requiredEvidence: Approved package matrix and provider product ids
Approved refund/cancellation rules
Approved waiver versions and signature workflow
Successful payment and waiver sandbox tests
cutoverTracks.blockedUntil: Payments/packages and waivers/legal external gates are approved.

relatedPromotionGates.requiredEvidence: Products, packages, taxes/fees, refunds, and settlement handling are approved by the business owner.
relatedPromotionGates.nextAction: Map approved packages to checkout flows and payment records.

relatedPromotionGates.requiredEvidence: Participation, medical, media, privacy, and travel consent language is approved before signature capture.
relatedPromotionGates.nextAction: Connect waiver versions to registrations, bookings, camps, and teams.

cutoverTracks.label: Legal, support, and communications cutover
cutoverTracks.currentState: Legacy LC Training legal/support references remain in place until support, legal, payment, and email sender changes are approved.
cutoverTracks.cutoverAction: Update support inboxes, sender names, legal pages, transactional emails, receipts, unsubscribe wording, and public contact copy.
cutoverTracks.rollbackAction: Restore LC Training legal/support copy and transactional sender settings if the brand switch is paused.
requiredEvidence: Approved Detroit Dynamo support inbox and sender identity
Approved legal entity, terms, privacy, and refund/support language
Transactional email and receipt templates reviewed
Unsubscribe and contact routing tested
cutoverTracks.blockedUntil: Legal/support ownership and sender-domain readiness are approved.

cutoverTracks.label: Content proof publication
cutoverTracks.currentState: Dynamo pages use honest future-pathway language, roster-ready layouts, proof slots, and placeholder states.
cutoverTracks.cutoverAction: Publish confirmed staff, rosters, sponsors, facilities, fixtures, news, testimonials, and proof assets.
cutoverTracks.rollbackAction: Remove unapproved proof content and return the affected sections to placeholder or interest-only states.
requiredEvidence: Approved staff, roster, and sponsor assets
Media releases and proof permissions
Confirmed fixtures/results/facilities before publication
Club director approval for public claims
cutoverTracks.blockedUntil: Claim-safety and external confirmation gates clear for each public proof item.

cutoverTracks.label: Monitoring, QA, and post-launch watch
cutoverTracks.currentState: Preview QA runs against the isolated Dynamo shell while the current LC site remains public.
cutoverTracks.cutoverAction: Run post-launch route, mobile, console, link, form, booking, admin, payment, waiver, and analytics checks.
cutoverTracks.rollbackAction: Trigger rollback if core routes, forms, payments, auth, admin, or legal/support workflows fail after launch.
requiredEvidence: Passing browser QA after promotion
Passing lint/build/typecheck/smoke tests
No critical console errors or dead public CTAs
Owner sign-off after the first launch verification pass
cutoverTracks.blockedUntil: Do not close the promotion window until post-launch QA and rollback readiness are documented.

evidenceNeeded: Approved isolated dd_* collection plan
Valid Appwrite project credentials
Verified detroitDynamoLeadIntake fixtures for all public form variants
Deployed detroitDynamoLeadIntake function
Verified detroitDynamoLeadPipelineAction fixtures for authenticated status changes
Verified detroitDynamoAdminModuleRead fixtures for protected module reads
Verified detroitDynamoAdminRoleGrantAction fixtures for Master Admin role grant management
Verified detroitDynamoAdminModuleWriteAction fixtures for protected module writes
Active dd_admin_role_assignments grants for every live admin role
Public form writes tested from production preview
launchReadiness.nextAction: Review the scaffold, replace expired credentials, run the dry run, then apply the Appwrite provisioner.

evidenceNeeded: Approved training package pricing
Camp, tryout, club dues, and sponsor package rules
Stripe or PayPal product mapping
Refund, cancellation, and failed-payment handling
launchReadiness.nextAction: Confirm business pricing and provider choice before connecting checkout or package purchase flows.

evidenceNeeded: Youth participation waiver
Medical consent and emergency contact language
Media release and privacy language
Adult participation and team-travel consent where needed
launchReadiness.nextAction: Have the owner and appropriate legal reviewer approve waiver text before collecting signatures.

evidenceNeeded: Confirmed senior league acceptance before naming membership
Confirmed youth league placement before naming competition
Roster, staff, insurance, and rules compliance
Published schedule only after opponents, dates, and venues are confirmed
launchReadiness.nextAction: Keep all UPSL, UPSL Women, and youth-league language framed as a goal until written confirmation exists.

evidenceNeeded: Confirmed training locations and permitted field access
Facility calendars for training, tryouts, camps, and matches
Insurance and safety requirements
Weather, cancellation, and communication procedures
launchReadiness.nextAction: Confirm facility partners and operating rules before publishing location-specific commitments.

evidenceNeeded: Approved Detroit Dynamo launch copy
Confirmed staff, testimonials, sponsor logos, news, and media
SEO metadata, sitemap, redirects, and social images approved
LC Training migration or preservation plan signed off
launchReadiness.nextAction: Keep the Dynamo site noindex and isolated until promotion timing, redirects, and real content are approved.

promotionGates.requiredEvidence: Root LC routes, booking, auth, forms, navigation, manifest, and footer continue to work before launch.
promotionGates.nextAction: Keep running current-site isolation checks before every promotion decision.

promotionGates.requiredEvidence: All required dd_* collections exist, permissions are reviewed, and public forms persist to Appwrite.
promotionGates.nextAction: Provision after final field review and valid credentials are available.

promotionGates.requiredEvidence: Products, packages, taxes/fees, refunds, and settlement handling are approved by the business owner.
promotionGates.nextAction: Map approved packages to checkout flows and payment records.

promotionGates.requiredEvidence: Participation, medical, media, privacy, and travel consent language is approved before signature capture.
promotionGates.nextAction: Connect waiver versions to registrations, bookings, camps, and teams.

promotionGates.requiredEvidence: No current league, fixture, roster, facility, or staff claim is published without confirmation.
promotionGates.nextAction: Maintain future-pathway language until official documents or owner-approved facts are available.

promotionGates.requiredEvidence: Canonical routes, sitemap, metadata, Open Graph assets, and old-route redirect timing are approved.
promotionGates.nextAction: Remove noindex only when Detroit Dynamo is the approved public brand.

backendActivationSteps.title: Run Local Backend Preflight
backendActivationSteps.evidence: Backend preflight report shows schema, function config, function source, pipeline-action fixture coverage, admin-module-read fixture coverage, admin-role-grant fixture coverage, admin-module-write fixture coverage, and env-key presence without printing secrets.
backendActivationSteps.nextAction: Resolve any failing local checks before attempting networked backend work.

backendActivationSteps.title: Review Appwrite Collection Plan
backendActivationSteps.evidence: Plan confirms the 18 requested operational dd_* collections plus admin audit event and admin role assignment collections with expected attributes, indexes, access policies, and public/function write paths.
backendActivationSteps.nextAction: Approve fields, indexes, owner roles, public-form destinations, and audit-event retention before applying.

backendActivationSteps.title: Provision Isolated Collections
backendActivationSteps.evidence: Appwrite contains the dd_* collections, attributes, indexes, and permissions required by the Detroit Dynamo model.
backendActivationSteps.nextAction: Use valid Appwrite credentials and do not mutate legacy LC Training collections.

backendActivationSteps.title: Configure Function Variables
backendActivationSteps.evidence: detroitDynamoLeadIntake, detroitDynamoLeadPipelineAction, detroitDynamoAdminModuleRead, detroitDynamoAdminRoleGrantAction, and detroitDynamoAdminModuleWriteAction have APPWRITE_API_KEY configured in Appwrite without exposing the key in logs or client code.
backendActivationSteps.nextAction: Confirm function variables after replacing any expired Appwrite key; set DETROIT_DYNAMO_BOOTSTRAP_ADMIN_USER_ID before first live Master Admin grant.

backendActivationSteps.title: Deploy Lead Intake, Pipeline, Module Read, Role Grant, and Module Write Functions
backendActivationSteps.evidence: detroitDynamoLeadIntake, detroitDynamoLeadPipelineAction, detroitDynamoAdminModuleRead, detroitDynamoAdminRoleGrantAction, and detroitDynamoAdminModuleWriteAction are deployed and enabled with database/document scopes from appwrite.json.
backendActivationSteps.nextAction: Deploy only after preflight, provisioning, and function variable configuration pass.

backendActivationSteps.title: Enable Appwrite Intake in Admin
backendActivationSteps.evidence: Protected admin mode is switched from Local Preview to Appwrite Intake after backend deployment.
backendActivationSteps.nextAction: Keep local preview fallback available until production-preview form submissions are verified.

backendActivationSteps.title: Submit Production-Preview Test Leads and Pipeline Actions
backendActivationSteps.command: npm run verify:dynamo-intake-contract && npm run verify:dynamo-pipeline-actions, then submit training, tryout, youth, senior, sponsor, and contact forms from /detroit-dynamo/*
backendActivationSteps.evidence: Pipeline action fixtures validate locally, test submissions create ContactLead plus expected TryoutRegistration or Sponsor records in the dd_* collections, and authenticated pipeline actions update allowed statuses.
backendActivationSteps.nextAction: Verify no console errors, no broken success states, valid status transitions, and clear admin routing for every lead type.

backendActivationSteps.title: Lock Promotion Gate Evidence
backendActivationSteps.evidence: Goal audit still passes implemented scope and keeps external gates visible until payments, waivers, facilities, and league facts are confirmed.
backendActivationSteps.nextAction: Do not remove preview-only noindex or redirect the current LC site until all promotion gates are approved.

requiredFacts: Approved private, small-group, team-training, camp, tryout, dues, and sponsor package pricing
Selected payment provider, checkout flow, refund policy, and failed-payment handling
Tax/fee treatment, discount policy, and settlement ownership
Admin reporting needs for packages, payments, refunds, and outstanding balances
confirmationRegisters.publishRule: Do not publish checkout links or exact package commitments until pricing and provider setup are approved.
confirmationRegisters.nextAction: Owner approves package matrix, provider, refund rules, and admin payment fields.

requiredFacts: Youth participation waiver and medical consent language
Media release, privacy/terms language, and adult participation waiver
Travel, emergency contact, and camp/clinic consent requirements
Versioning, expiration, guardian signature, and retention rules
confirmationRegisters.publishRule: Do not collect signatures or present legal text as final until owner/legal review is complete.
confirmationRegisters.nextAction: Prepare approved waiver versions and map each form/program to the right waiver requirement.

requiredFacts: Confirmed senior men league acceptance before naming current UPSL or similar membership
Confirmed senior women league acceptance before naming current UPSL Women or similar membership
Confirmed youth league placement before naming current youth competition
Fixture, opponent, venue, roster, staff, and competition rules confirmed before publication
confirmationRegisters.publishRule: Use future-pathway language until written league or competition confirmation exists.
confirmationRegisters.nextAction: Collect official league/competition documentation and owner-approved public wording.

requiredFacts: Confirmed training locations, field permits, indoor facility access, and match venues
Calendar availability for private training, camps, tryouts, youth teams, and senior teams
Insurance, safety, weather, cancellation, check-in, and emergency procedures
Published location names, addresses, parking/access notes, and facility partner permissions
confirmationRegisters.publishRule: Do not publish facility commitments, addresses, or schedules until operating access is confirmed.
confirmationRegisters.nextAction: Confirm facility partners, operating rules, insurance requirements, and calendar windows.

requiredFacts: Confirmed staff names, roles, bios, licenses, photos, and public contact rules
Background check, safeguarding, and youth communication standards
Approved rosters, player photos, bios, statuses, and parent/player release permissions
Team manager assignments and internal access levels
confirmationRegisters.publishRule: Do not publish staff, roster, or player bio details until permissions and verification are complete.
confirmationRegisters.nextAction: Collect staff/roster approvals and map internal roles to admin permissions.

requiredFacts: Approved sponsor packages, logos, website links, activation inventory, and display permissions
Real testimonials, player stories, media clips, and partner quotes
Launch announcements, news categories, editorial approval workflow, and image rights
SEO/social assets, redirect timing, sitemap/robots publication, and current-site migration wording
confirmationRegisters.publishRule: Keep proof slots as placeholders until real quotes, sponsor assets, and content rights are approved.
confirmationRegisters.nextAction: Approve sponsor assets, proof content, launch copy, and publication workflow before promotion.
